column9: [Intl] London hybrid (>=25% in-office) + customer-site travel; £225-240K + equity; 4+ yrs SWE/FDE/founder is stretch from 2.5y; Manga Lens already integrates Claude Sonnet in production (direct match); F-1 OPT US-based → needs Tier 2/Skilled Worker visa; Anthropic explicitly sponsors visas (conditional)
